description: Verify baseline: install deps, run mypy and pytest to confirm clean starting state before P2 work.
steps: Run python -m mypy app and confirm 0 errors
Run python -m pytest -q --tb=short and confirm 125+ tests pass
findings: mypy: 0 errors (clean). pytest: 125 passed, 42 skipped, 14 deselected, 14 subtests passed in 1.17s. Environment uses Python 3.12 (not 3.11) with all deps pre-installed. QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen required for headless Qt tests. Baseline is clean and ready for P2 work.
